quotes: Apply the palette in the primary > secondary > tertiary ratio shown in the guide: blues and golds dominate; tertiary colors are accents and surfaces.

rules.intent: Maintain the established brand color balance throughout layouts.
rules.rule_text: Apply the palette in the primary > secondary > tertiary ratio: blues and golds dominate; tertiary colors are accents and surfaces.

quotes: Headlines/headings: Brand Blue (or White on dark/gradient backgrounds).
Body text: Graphite #212121 on light backgrounds; White on dark backgrounds
Headlines/headings: Brand Blue (or White on dark/gradient backgrounds).
Body text: Graphite #212121 on light backgrounds; White on dark backgrounds

rules.intent: Ensure optimal text readability and contrast across different background values.
rules.rule_text: Headlines must use Brand Blue (headline.color = #00529b) on light backgrounds, or White (#ffffff) on dark/gradient backgrounds. Body text must use Graphite (body.color = #212121) on light backgrounds, and White (#ffffff) on dark backgrounds.

quotes: Sunshine/Gold strictly reserved for emphasizing key figures
Charts/about:blank Brand Blue + Sky Blue dominant; Sunshine/Gold strictly reserved for emphasizing key figures; gray for placebo.

rules.intent: Ensure high semantic clarity and uniform data visualization patterns.
rules.rule_text: In charts, Brand Blue (#00529b) and Sky Blue (#358CCB) are dominant. Sunshine/Gold (color.primary.gold = #ffc60a) is strictly reserved for emphasizing key figures, while gray is used for placebo values.

quotes: Light Blue at 70% tint (data callouts); Golden Sand at 30% tint (text-heavy callouts)
Callout surfaces: Light Blue at 70% tint (data callouts); Golden Sand at 30% tint (text-heavy callouts).

rules.intent: Standardize callout styling to distinguish numeric data from editorial text.
rules.rule_text: Callout surfaces must use Light Blue (#E6F0F9) at 70% opacity (opacity.logo.gold = 0.7) for data callouts, and Golden Sand (#FEF1C8) at 30% opacity (opacity.callout.golden_sand_box = 0.3) for text-heavy callouts.

quotes: never for primary CTAs, headlines, or data
avoid Coral in email sections unless the brief calls for it.
Coral: sparing tertiary accent only — never for primary CTAs, headlines, or data. [GENERAL]: avoid Coral in email sections unless the brief calls for it.

rules.intent: Restrict highly saturated warning/accent colors from diluting main primary palette actions.
rules.rule_text: Coral (color.tertiary.coral = #F26A38) must not be used for primary CTAs, headlines, or data. Furthermore, Coral should be avoided entirely in email sections unless explicitly mandated by the creative brief.

quotes: Brand Blue #00529b, underlined, on light backgrounds; White underlined on dark.
Links [GENERAL]: Brand Blue #00529b, underlined, on light backgrounds; White underlined on dark.

rules.intent: Maintain standard, accessible, and recognizable states for all actionable text links.
rules.rule_text: Hyperlinks must be underlined and colored Brand Blue (body.link.color = #00529b) on light backgrounds, or White (#ffffff) on dark backgrounds.

quotes: 70% transparency of Pantone 7548 C / #ffc60a must be maintained in all instances
The logo icon's 70% transparency of Pantone 7548 C / #ffc60a must be maintained in all instances (logo, and when the mark is used as a pattern/graphic).

rules.intent: Preserve regulatory/brand trademark integrity of the logo graphic.
rules.rule_text: The logo icon's 70% opacity (opacity.logo.gold = 0.7) of Pantone 7548 C / #ffc60a must be maintained in all instances, including logos and when the mark is utilized as a background pattern or graphic asset.
